title: Brachystele cycloglossa

The plant has been used in traditional medicine, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in treating various health conditions. Brachystele cycloglossa is often used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly prepared and consumed for their supposed therapeutic benefits.
